name: clock-wipe
title: clockWipe
description: A clock-hand wipe — the boundary between scenes rotates around the canvas center like a sweeping clock hand. Requires `width` + `height` (pass from `useVideoConfig()`). Wraps Remotion's `clockWipe()`.
pickWhen: a deliberately cinematic cut that signals time passing — chapter break, montage divider. Use `iris` for the camera-shutter feel instead.
